_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Machine Learning Algorithm for the Prediction of WHO Grade 1 Meningioma Recurrence.

_contextSnippet: The meningioma recurrence score (MRS) efficiently predicts recurrence risk in patients with WHO grade 1 meningioma, even when surgical GTR is achieved
details: Efficiently predicts recurrence risk in patients with WHO grade 1 meningioma, even when surgical GTR is achieved
